notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Paredes reaches on a fielder's choice. Christian Walker to 2nd. Christian Walker advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by third baseman José Ramírez.

notableEvents.label: Jose Altuve GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jose Altuve grounds into a double play, second baseman Juan Brito to first baseman Kyle Manzardo. Yordan Alvarez out at 2nd. Jose Altuve out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Cam Smith steals (4) 2nd base. Cam Smith to 3rd. Cam Smith advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Bo Naylor.
